mapper.update: UPDATE setmeal SET status=#{status}, update_user=#{updateUser}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM setmeal WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT image FROM setmeal WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT s.id, s.category_id, s.name, s.price, s.status, s.description, s.image, s.update_time, c.name AS category_name, sd.id AS sd_id, sd.setmeal_id AS sd_setmeal_id, sd.dish_id AS sd_dish_id, sd.name AS sd_name, sd.price AS sd_price, sd.copies AS sd_copies FROM setmeal AS s LEFT JOIN category AS c ON s.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN setmeal_dish AS sd ON s.id = sd.setmeal_id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT category_id, create_time, create_user, description, id, image, name, price, status, update_time, update_user FROM setmeal WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1
SELECT sd.copies, d.name, d.description, d.image FROM setmeal_dish AS sd LEFT JOIN dish AS d ON sd.dish_id = d.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO setmeal (category_id, name, price, status, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{status}, #{description}, #{image}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
